payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet front with two recessed rectangular panel doors separated by a vertical seam, medium glossy finish with visible wood grain and light reflection, small decorative scalloped top molding, lower edge slightly cropped by the image — appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.
